item.title: DEBT: Decompose EditorShellView into focused coordinators
item.intent: A view with 23 @State properties is untestable and unmaintainable — each concern must own its own state
item.description: EditorShellView currently owns text editing state, 4 AI coordinators + 4 AI services, export state, conflict management, and subscription checks. Extract into: (1) AICoordinator that owns improve/summarize/tone/ghost coordinators and services, (2) ExportCoordinator that owns PDF and markdown share state, (3) move FileConflictManager into FileOpenCoordinator. EditorShellView should only own editor content and compose these coordinators.
acceptanceCriteria: AICoordinator owns all AI-related state and coordinators
ExportCoordinator owns PDF and markdown share sheet state
FileConflictManager is owned by FileOpenCoordinator, not the view
All existing editor functionality works identically after decomposition
Each extracted coordinator is independently testable
